meaning: n.犯罪地点,审判地,集合地点,会议地点,比赛地点,管辖地
examples: We're still trying to decide on a venue.
The venue was packed with 3 000 clubbers.
The venue for the World Cup remains undecided.
The Palm House is not the only festival venue with an unusual architectural history.
The venue too was the most disappointing of the three that England supporters have visited.
